calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-03-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-29-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Reina Killen for (petitioner) Margarete Noe.

The Court asked counsel if further searching would be beneficial. Ms. Killen stated that no further search would be effective, that Mr. O'Grady spoke with the decedent and confirmed that the decedent was never married and never had children, that Ms. Noe was a close friend of the decedents and a retired social worker, that she made a search of the home for information, that the only relatives were the decedents parents and a brother and all are deceased. The Court took the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
